reason: All 8 acceptance criteria are fully satisfied. (1) users: unified_user_id UUID with gen_random_uuid(), platform VARCHAR(32), platform_user_id VARCHAR(255), UNIQUE(platform, platform_user_id) present. (2) conversations: satisfaction_score FLOAT, first_contact_resolution BOOLEAN, scope_type VARCHAR(64), dst_state JSONB all present. (3) messages: intent_detected VARCHAR(128), sentiment_category VARCHAR(32), sentiment_intensity FLOAT, knowledge_source VARCHAR(64) all present. (4) knowledge_base: embeddings vector(384), keywords TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', version INTEGER all present; pgvector extension created first. (5) platform_configs: rate_limit_rps INTEGER DEFAULT 10, webhook_secret_key_ref TEXT present. (6) escalation_queue: priority INTEGER DEFAULT 1, sla_deadline TIMESTAMPTZ present (Phase 2 column already reserved, no ALTER TABLE needed). (7) user_feedback: feedback VARCHAR(16) CHECK (feedback IN ('thumbs_up','thumbs_down')) present. (8) security_logs: layer VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, blocked BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, source_ip TEXT present. TABLE_DEFS contains exactly 8 tables; PHASE2_TABLE_DEFS is a separate structure, correctly isolated. Tests cover table count, name set, and column presence. No regressions detected.
